eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Jefferson, OR; at 1:47 PM on JUL 23, 2026 Effective until 4:47 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Level 3 - GO NOW - Evacuate immediately from The eastern side of NE 12 from NE coleman Rd to the west side of HWY 97 following down to Lyle Gap. 
Nivel 3 - VAYASE AHORA - Evacue inmediatamente de The eastern side of NE 12 from NE coleman Rd to the west side of HWY 97 following down to Lyle Gap.
